negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_030
prompt: The video opens with a static shot of a light beige coffee table, where a black kettlebell and a yellow rubber duck are positioned side by side. The background features a mustard-yellow couch, adding a warm tone to the scene. A dark cylindrical object, likely a cup or container, is partially visible on the far left edge of the frame. As the video progresses, a grey tennis ball emerges from a black tube located on the left side of the table. The ball rolls smoothly across the table, moving from left to right, colliding with the kettlebell on the left of the rubber duck before exiting the frame to the left. By the final frame, the tennis ball has completely left the scene, leaving the kettlebell and rubber duck stationary on the table.  A medium shot captures the entire table, emphasizing the interaction between the tennis ball, kettlebell, and rubber duck. The camera remains steady throughout, focusing on the dynamic movement of the tennis ball as it rolls across the table.
